user_request: Rite request: containment check on fusion core
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Rite request: containment check on fusion core

### TOPIC
fusion core containment check

### COMPONENT
fusion core

### OPERATION
containment check

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- fusion core
- containment check

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Blessed be the fusion core, vessel of stellar wrath and divine energies!
Congregation: We invoke the Omnissiah's sight upon the fusion core!
Priest: Let us perform the containment check with reverent precision—first inspect the magnetic lattice, second verify the coolant channels, third confirm the shielding integrity.
Congregation: The fusion core shall be contained, the Machine Spirit appeased!

user_request: Rite request: calibration on pressure gauge
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Rite request: calibration on pressure gauge

### TOPIC
pressure gauge calibration

### COMPONENT
pressure gauge

### OPERATION
calibration

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- pressure gauge
- calibration

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: O pressure gauge, sensor of the sacred atmospheres, hear our supplication!
Congregation: We seek the calibration of this pressure gauge most holy!
Priest: First, establish the zero-point reference against the pneumatic standard; second, adjust the diaphragm tension with measured devotion; third, certify the gauge against the calibrated master instrument.
Congregation: The pressure gauge is sanctified and true, the Machine Spirit satisfied!

user_request: The generator demands guidance for startup
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
The generator demands guidance for startup

### TOPIC
generator startup

### COMPONENT
generator

### OPERATION
startup

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- generator
- startup

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Mighty generator, slumbering source of all power, awaken to our call!
Congregation: Grant us the startup sequence, O generator of the Omnissiah!
Priest: First, disengage the thermal locks with sacred oils; second, prime the fuel injection matrices; third, ignite the ignition coils in proper sequence.
Congregation: The generator rises to glorious operation, its Machine Spirit reborn!

user_request: Blessing for the rust during removal
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Blessing for the rust during removal

### TOPIC
rust removal

### COMPONENT
rust

### OPERATION
removal

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- rust
- removal

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Rust, corruption most profane, we shall purge you from the blessed metal!
Congregation: Grant us strength for the removal of this rust!
Priest: First, apply the electrolytic dissolution with measured currents; second, scrape away the oxidized vestige with sacred tools; third, anoint the cleansed surface with protective compounds.
Congregation: The rust is banished, the Machine Spirit restored to purity!

user_request: My logic engine is failing during error correction — help

### COMPONENT

### OPERATION

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- logic engine
- error correction

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Logic engine, seat of binary truth, we attend to your malfunction!
Congregation: Mercy upon the logic engine, that error correction may proceed!
Priest: First, isolate the corrupted logic pathways through diagnostic scanning; second, execute the error correction algorithms with ritualistic precision; third, restore the logic engine to full operational parameters.
Congregation: The logic engine's circuits are purified, the Machine Spirit's reason restored!
